rulings.Case Title: DE GUZMAN VS JUDICIAL COUNCIL OF CALIF
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION To Reconsider Order On Demuurrers To Third Amended Complaint And Judgment;
rulings.Rulings: MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION UNDER CCP 1008 DENIED. COURT LACKS JURISDICTION TO HEAR THIS MOTION BECAUSE JUDGMENT HAS BEEN ENTERED SEE RAMON VS. AEROSPACE (1996) 50 CAL.APP.4TH 1233, 1237-1238. REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS DENIED. (PB)

rulings.Case Title: 161 GILBERT ST HOMEOWNERS VS SOMA LOFTS
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Good Faith Determination Of Settlement; Memorandum Of P/A; And Declarations In Support; Proof Of Service
rulings.Rulings: GRANT, NO OPPOSITION FILED.

rulings.Case Title: MANJI VS LOOMIS SAYLES & COMPANY L P
rulings.Calendar Matter: AMENDED MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
rulings.Rulings: PLAINTIFF's MSJ/MSA on X-C = DENY MSJ AND GRANT MSA IN PART. DENY AS TO 1ST CAUSE OF ACTION. TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT RE IMPROPER DISCLSOURE AND SOLICITATION. DENY AS TO 2ND CAUSE OF ACTION. FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH CRC 342(d) & (h). INDEED, THE SEPARATE STATEMENT DOES NOT EVEN MENTION THE CONTRACT/CODE OF ETHICS. GRANT AS TO 3RD CAUSE OF ACTION BECAUSE NO AUTHORITY FOR PRIVATE RIGHT OF ACTION. DENY AS TO 4TH, 5TH, 6TH, 7TH, AND 8TH. TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT RE MISAPPROPRIATION, BREACH OF DUTY, UNFAIR COMPETITION, AND WRONGFUL CONDUCT. (PB)

rulings.Case Title: MANJI VS LOOMIS SAYLES & COMPANY L P
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion To Dile Documents Under Seal; Memo P/A,Separate Statement,
rulings.Rulings: GRANT. (PB)

rulings.Case Title: MANJI VS LOOMIS SAYLES & COMPANY L P
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion Of Deft Robert Blanding For Summary Judgment
rulings.Rulings: DEFENDANT's (LOOMIS) MSJ/MSA = DENY MSJ AND GRANT MSA IN PART. DENY AS TO 1ST CAUSE OF ACTION. CAUSE OF ACTION NOT PREEMPTED AND AFTER ACQUIRED EVIDENCE DOCTRINE DOES NOT CLEARLY BAR THE CAUSE OF ACTION. THE PARTIES DISPUTE THE EXTENT OF DISCLOSURE OF TRADE SECRETS. GRANT AS TO 2ND CAUSE OF ACTION. "FRESH START" LANGUAGE PRECATORY AND NOT AN ENFORCEABLE CONTRACT TERM. GRANT AS TO 3RD & 4TH CAUSES OF ACTION. PLAINTIFF MERELY CITES VAGUE ASSURANCES OF CONTINUED EMPLOYMENT. GRANT AS TO 5TH CAUSE OF ACTION UNDER Kraslawsky v. Upper Deck Co., (1997) 56 Cal.App.4th 179, 194. DENY AS TO 6TH CAUSE OF ACTION. DEFENDANT FAILED TO SHIFT BURDEN AND TIF RE DEFENDANT'S MALICE UNDER CC 47. DENY AS TO 7TH CAUSE OF ACTION. TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT RE WRONGFUL CONDUCT, CAUSATION, AND DAMAGES. (PB) DEFENDANT's (BLANDING) MSJ = DENY AS TO 6TH CAUSE OF ACTION. DEFENDANT FAILED TO SHIFT BURDEN AND TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT RE DEFENDANT'S MALICE UNDER CC 47. DENY AS TO 7TH CAUSE OF ACTION. TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT RE WRONGFUL CONDUCT, CAUSATION, AND DAMAGES. (PB)

rulings.Case Title: MANJI VS LOOMIS SAYLES & COMPANY L P
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To File Documents Under Seal
rulings.Rulings: GRANT. (PB)

rulings.Case Title: KHOUJA VS KING
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: DEMURRER SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. BECAUSE OF NARROW EXCEPTION TO RULE THAT PHYSCIANS NOT LIABLE TO THIRD PARTIES FOR MALPRACTICE AS SET FORTH IN MYERS VS. QUESENBERRY 144 CAL.APP.3D 888 (1983) COURT ORDERS PLAINTIFF IN ANY AMENDED COMPLAINT TO ALLEGE SPECIFIC DETAILED FACTS SIMILAR TO WHAT IS REQUIRED IN FRAUD ACTION. (CW)

rulings.Case Title: JAMIE CIRDAIN VS. CHRISTOPHER ROSS DC et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion To Strike Punitive Damages And Demurrer To Complaint
rulings.Rulings: DEMURRER TO 3RD CAUSE OF ACTION SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. MOTION TO STRIKE CLAIMS FOR PUNITIVE DAMAGES GRANTED IN ITS ENTIRETY. PLAINTIFF DOES NOT OPPOSE IT FOR THE 1ST, 2ND, AND 4TH CAUSES OF ACTION. AS TO THE 3RD CAUSE OF ACTION FOR SEXUAL BATTERY, THE OFFENSIVE TOUCHING, AS ALLEGED, WAS SUFFICIENTLY RELATED TO THE TREATMENT SOUGHT BY PLAINTIFF TO REQUIRE AN EVIDENTIARY SHOWING UNDER CCP SECTION 425.13 BEFORE PUNITIVE DAMAGES CAN BE SOUGHT. (JH)
